title: Vladivostok、Primorsky Krai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Vladivostok、Primorsky Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Vladivostok是Primorsky Krai的一个城市，人口约605,000。Russia’s Pacific port city, a dynamic hub for trade and culture, home to the famous Golden Horn Bridge and Russky Island.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
